mapper.select:
SELECT ID, SHIFT_DATE, SHIFT_CLASS_CODE, SHIFT_CLASS_NAME, SHIFT_BY, SHIFT_BY_NAME, ACCEPT_BY, ACCEPT_BY_NAME, HYDROLOGIC, TIDE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_DIS_LOG
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_DIS_LOG( ID, SHIFT_DATE, SHIFT_CLASS_CODE, SHIFT_CLASS_NAME, SHIFT_BY, SHIFT_BY_NAME, ACCEPT_BY, ACCEPT_BY_NAME, HYDROLOGIC, TIDE, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shiftDate, jdbcType=DATE}, #{shiftClassCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shiftClassName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shiftByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptBy, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{acceptByName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hydrologic, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tide, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_DIS_LOG SET SHIFT_DATE = #{shiftDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIFT_CLASS_CODE = #{shiftClassCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIFT_CLASS_NAME = #{shiftClassName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SHIFT_BY = #{shiftBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, SHIFT_BY_NAME = #{shiftByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ACCEPT_BY = #{acceptBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ACCEPT_BY_NAME = #{acceptByName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, HYDROLOGIC = #{hydrologic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TIDE = #{tide,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
